description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.2.2 Docker image and caches the node_modules directory with cache key node622, running npm install --quiet in a before_script. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test-all job that executes npm run test. In the deploy stage add a pages job that creates a public folder, runs npm run build, copies index.html and the dist folder into public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
